text:
miwi        2012-05-30 08:06:50 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                     pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Collection of repoze.who friendly form plugins
  
  repoze.who-friendlyform is a repoze.who plugin which
  provides a collection of developer-friendly form plugins,
  although for the time being such a collection has only
  one item.
  
  WWW:    http://code.gustavonarea.net/repoze.who-friendlyform/
  
  PR:             ports/167703
  Submitted by:   Yuan-Chung Hsiao <ychsiao@gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4970    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +9 -0      ports/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/devel/py-repoze.who-friendlyform/pkg-plist (new)
